text:
Aug 4, 2024, 12:00 PM                        |Updated:Aug 5, 2024, 11:55 am

BYMELISSA MOORE

KOSI 101.1

Tom Cruise is known for doing his own stunts and taking risks.  His Olympic finale stunt will be no different.  According toTMZ, Cruise isorchestrating a breathtaking stunt for the Paris Olympics closing ceremonythat has him rappelling down Stade de France, land on the field, and carry the official Olympic flag.

Cruise will thenskydive from an airplane to the Hollywood sign to pass the flag to Los Angelesfor the 2028 Summer Games.  The stunts were actually filmed in March.

Cruise is currently filming ‘Mission Impossible 8’ in Europe.
